prompt: Photorealistic fitness app instructional START POSITION still image of Lat Pulldown. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. Do not include the reference background. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. Full body visible including feet. Neutral modern gym with a lat pulldown cable machine, stable fixed camera, bright professional lighting. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no mirrors showing extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture. The bar is above and slightly in front of the forehead with the cable vertical; it is NOT behind the head or neck. Grip is wider than shoulder width, wrists neutral, chest lifted, spine neutral. Never show behind-the-neck form.
